title: drop_target_block
description: Remove an entire `mk target set/append NAME <<TAG ... TAG` heredoc block from overlay.dops (block-level delete; symmetric for add_target_block). For line-level `mk` directives use drop_mk_directive; to edit inside a block body use replace_in_dops_block.

block_name.description: The target name on the `mk target set/append <name> <<TAG` opening line.

reason.description: Why this target block is obsolete — lands in the intent log and the operator commit message

scope.description: Build-line section to search. '@any' (default) targets the universal section. '@current' resolves to the env's current target at apply time. Never type literal '@2026Q2'; the runner injects t.target.
